assertions.assertion: Local /api/orders endpoint uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: The local endpoint only uses .RequireAuthorization() and does not call .AsBffApiEndpoint().

assertions.assertion: Calls AddRemoteApis() on the BFF builder
assertions.rationale: The code does not call .AddRemoteApis() on the BFF builder, which is required in v4.

assertions.assertion: Uses MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint for /api/catalog pointing to https://catalog-service.internal/api
assertions.rationale: Code contains MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint with the correct path and URI.
Code uses `.RequireAccessToken(TokenType.User)` which is the v3 syntax, not v4's `.WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User)`.
